characters.name: Papa Russet
characters.description: Tall handsome dog fox with deep rich russet coat, dramatic silver streak along his back, long elegant black legs, magnificent bushy tail, warm amber eyes
uniqueFeatures: TALLEST character — significantly larger than Mama Fern, towers over both kits
Deep RICH RUSSET coat — darker and more intense red than any other character
Dramatic SILVER STREAK running along his back — his signature mark, like a bolt of lightning
Long ELEGANT BLACK LEGS — tall and powerful, built for speed and silent movement
MAGNIFICENT bushy tail — the biggest tail, used as a blanket for the whole family
Warm AMBER eyes — golden-brown, always alert and watchful
characters.personality: Wise and adventurous — stands tall and alert, ears always turning, protective but encouraging
characters.notLike: NOT slim or delicate like Mama Fern, NOT small or round like the kits, NOT light-coloured

characters.name: Mama Fern
characters.description: Graceful vixen with softer golden-orange coat, beautiful cream chest, gentle warm brown eyes, distinctive pale patch behind one ear
uniqueFeatures: SOFTER GOLDEN-ORANGE coat — clearly lighter and warmer-toned than Papa's deep russet
Beautiful CREAM CHEST — prominent light patch on chest and belly
Gentle warm BROWN eyes — softer and more nurturing than Papa's amber
Distinctive PALE PATCH behind one ear — her unique identifying mark
More SLENDER and graceful build than Papa — elegant but not as tall
Often seen CURLED protectively — body language always nurturing and sheltering
characters.personality: Patient and nurturing — often curled protectively around kits, gentle and wise about the forest
characters.notLike: NOT as tall or dark as Papa Russet, NOT as small as the kits, NOT as intense or bold-coloured

characters.name: Pip
characters.description: Smallest kit with brightest vivid orange fur, oversized perky ears, one distinctive white sock on front left paw, curious tilted-head pose
uniqueFeatures: SMALLEST character — much smaller than both parents, slightly smaller than Clover
BRIGHTEST vivid orange fur — more intensely orange than any other character
OVERSIZED perky ears — disproportionately large for his small head
One distinctive WHITE SOCK on front left paw — the other three paws are black
Signature TILTED-HEAD pose — always tilting head sideways to listen
Bright curious eyes — always wide open with wonder
characters.personality: Curious and brave — always tilting head sideways to listen, eager to try everything, boundless energy
characters.notLike: NOT as big as Clover, much SMALLER than adults, NOT dark-auburn like Clover, NOT calm or still

characters.name: Clover
characters.description: Slightly larger kit with darker reddish-auburn coat, extra-large white tail tip, tiny dark freckle on nose, notably bushy tail for her age
uniqueFeatures: Slightly LARGER than Pip — bigger and more solidly built, but still clearly a kit
DARKER REDDISH-AUBURN coat — distinctly different from Pip's bright orange
EXTRA-LARGE white tail tip — bigger white tip than any other character
Tiny dark FRECKLE on nose — her unique identifying mark
Notably BUSHY TAIL for her age — takes after Papa's magnificent brush
Determined expression — slightly narrowed eyes, focused and clever
characters.personality: Clever and determined — always figuring things out first, independent and resourceful
characters.notLike: NOT as bright-orange as Pip, NOT as big as adults, NOT as small as Pip, NOT timid or hesitant

step3.styleDescription:
Pixar-quality 3D rendering. Smooth, rounded forms with subsurface scattering on skin. Expressive character animation with large soulful eyes. Rich saturated colors. Photorealistic textures but stylized proportions. Professional children's book illustration quality. Cinematic lighting with warm key light and cool fill.

Emphasis on light passing through materials — translucent ears, glowing skin edges, light shining through leaves/water/ice. Subsurface scattering cranked up. Back-lit subjects with ethereal glow.

Rich botanical detail filling the frame — individually rendered leaves, visible bark texture, dewdrops on petals, moss on stones, flowers in full bloom. Nature as living wallpaper.
